textPlain: Ruby has a lot of these hidden gems (pun intended).I wouldn't be as much in love with programming, if it wasn't for Ruby. And although I use many other programming languages these days, Ruby will forever have a special place in my heart.
title is actually "Ruby already solved my problem"
Agreed. Was looking around for STL  files so I could print a ruby and put it on my desk.Glad to see it's getting love on here recently.
Thanks, that helped.  My unspoken question when I saw the title was "does that mean you now have two problems?".
